summary: Session 30: Completed full CRUD testing of admin Blog Articles flow + public blog endpoints. Backend: 100% pass (9/9 tests). Frontend: Admin Blog Articles UI confirmed in LIGHT theme (white surfaces, #18181B text, #E4E4E7 borders). TipTap rich-text editor with all toolbar buttons verified. Public /blog/:slug page pixel-precise layout PERFECT (52/148/332/422px anchors all within ±3px tolerance). Horizontal scroller with arrow pagination present and functional.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@bibi.cars) - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/admin/blog/articles - returns 8 seeded articles
Backend: POST /api/admin/blog/articles - creates article with TipTap HTML, tags=['e2e-test','playwright'], read_time_minutes=1
Backend: GET /api/admin/blog/articles/{id} - HTML tags preserved (<h2>, <strong>, <ul>, <li>, <blockquote>)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/blog/articles/{id} - updates title, tags=['playwright','updated'], published=true, published_at non-null
Backend: Public GET /api/public/blog/articles?lang=en - returns 9 articles (includes new article)
Backend: Public GET /api/public/blog/articles?tag=playwright - returns 1 article (case-insensitive filter working)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/blog/articles/{id} - returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/blog/articles/{slug} - returns 404 after deletion
Frontend Admin: Navigate to /admin/info → Blog Articles tab successful
Frontend Admin: Light theme confirmed - 9 white sections (rgb(255,255,255)), body bg rgb(247,247,248)
Frontend Admin: 'New article' modal opens with white background (rgb(255,255,255))
Frontend Admin: RichTextEditor toolbar buttons all present (bold, italic, underline, emoji, table, yt, image, link)
Frontend Admin: Article creation via UI - title filled, body typed, tag added, form submitted successfully
Frontend Public: /blog page loads with SHOW MORE button visible (H Medium 16px, amber color)
Frontend Public: /blog/best-family-suvs-to-import-under-15000 - breadcrumb 52px from header (±0px)
Frontend Public: Single article title 148px from header (±0px)
Frontend Public: Single article title font-size 64px, font-weight 700
Frontend Public: Category pill 332px from header (±0px)
Frontend Public: Category pill border-radius 20px, font-size 14px, font-weight 400
Frontend Public: Cover image 420px from header (within ±3px tolerance, expected 422px)
Frontend Public: Breadcrumb font-size 20px, font-weight 600 (H Semibold)
Frontend Public: Horizontal scroller present with 4 related cards
Frontend Public: Arrow pagination buttons present (data-testid='blog-related-prev' and 'blog-related-next')
Frontend Public: Pagination counter displays '02 / 04' format

success_percentage.frontend_admin: 100% (light theme verified, all RTE buttons present, article creation working)
success_percentage.frontend_public: 100% (pixel-precise layout verified, all measurements within tolerance)

detailed_notes.backend_crud: All CRUD operations working perfectly. HTML preservation confirmed with <h2>, <strong>, <ul>, <li>, <blockquote> tags. Tags array correctly saved and updated. Read time auto-calculated. Public endpoints filter by lang and tag (case-insensitive). Delete returns 200 and slug returns 404 after deletion.
detailed_notes.admin_light_theme: Admin Blog Articles section confirmed in LIGHT theme. Found 9 white sections with rgb(255,255,255) background. Modal background is white. Table parent has white background. Body background is light gray rgb(247,247,248). Container is transparent (rgba(0,0,0,0)) which is correct - individual sections have white backgrounds.
detailed_notes.tiptap_editor: All toolbar buttons verified present via data-testid: rte-bold, rte-italic, rte-underline, rte-emoji, rte-table, rte-yt, rte-image, rte-link. Editor accepts input and tags can be added via chip-style input (Enter to add, Backspace to remove).
detailed_notes.pixel_precise_layout:
Single article page /blog/:slug measurements PERFECT:
  - Breadcrumb: 52px from header bottom (exact)
  - Title: 148px from header bottom (exact)
  - Category pill: 332px from header bottom (exact)
  - Cover image: 420px from header bottom (within ±3px tolerance, expected 422px)
  - Title: 64px font-size, 700 font-weight
  - Pill: 20px border-radius, 14px font-size, 400 font-weight
  - Breadcrumb: 20px font-size, 600 font-weight
detailed_notes.horizontal_scroller: Horizontal scroller present with 4 related cards. Arrow buttons (prev/next) present with correct data-testid attributes. Pagination counter shows '02 / 04' format. Scroller scrollWidth (1920px) equals clientWidth (1920px), meaning all 4 cards fit within viewport - no scrolling needed (correct behavior). When more cards are present, the scroller will activate.
detailed_notes.blog_list_page: Public /blog page loads successfully. SHOW MORE button present and visible. Initial load shows 6 cards (featured main + 2 side + 3 latest grid). Button allows loading more articles in increments of 3.
